name: The Perfect Sniper
short_description: The Romano family has taken over the city. Corrupt politicians and police agencies do nothing to stop them. Become the morally ambiguous champion this city needs as a Sniper in Virtual Reality.
detailed_description:
Content Patch!

PATCH HISTORY:

- 1.2 - 05/01/2018 at 4:00PM EST
Major bug fixes, thanks everyone for your contribution and support!

- 1.1.2 - 2/14/2018 at 8:05PM EST
Added: Further optimization. Fixed: Tutorial bug (failing when shooting and hitting nothing [sky])

- 1.1 - 2/11/2018 at 9:50PM EST
Added auto-pause / unpause based on HMD Worn state, fixed a few mission bugs and optimized the game further.

- 1.0.9 - 2/5/2018 at 4:30AM EST
Arcade Mode #3 Added! + Fixed: A few bugs.

- 1.0.8 - 2/3/2018 at 10:39PM EST
Arcade Mode #2 Added! + A Holographic sight to non-sniping, fast-paced missions. Fixed: A few mission bugs.

- 1.0.7 - 1/31/2018 at 9:06PM EST
Steam Achievements Added! + Bug Patch. Fixed the HTC Vive controller rotations, they now feel natural.

- 1.0.6 - 1/30/2018 at 1:26PM EST
Arcade Mode #1 Added! + Bug Patch. Fixed a few fade-in/out bugs and the player's height during transitional environments.

- 1.0.5 - 1/28/2018 at 10:28PM EST
Visual enhancement patch! Also now preventing players from clipping through vehicle(s).

- 1.0.4 - 1/27/2018 at 11:48AM EST
Fixed the audio bug on HTC Vive and a few HMD issues towards end-game.

- 1.0.3 - 1/26/2018 at 2:39AM EST
Optimization and a few bug fixes.

- 1.0.2 - 1/25/2018 at 11:37PM EST
Bug Patch. The reload 'eject shell' mechanic fixed on a few missions.

- 1.0.1 - 1/25/2018 at 9:37PM EST
Bug Patch. Arcade button fixed along with a few mission bugs.

- 1.0.0 - 1/22/2018 at 8:00AM EST
Full Content Unlock! The storyline is now available.

If you encounter any bugs, please use the form via the link below to contact us directly.
We work hard to resolve problems with our games and we'll get right on it!

Bug Report:


About the Game

The Romano family has taken over the city. Corrupt politicians and police agencies do nothing to stop them. Become the morally ambiguous champion this city needs as a Sniper in Virtual Reality.

The Perfect Sniper is a stylized, story-driven and action-packed VR game that lets you take on the role of a deadly vigilante as you take down the Romanos, an organized crime family involved in an underground market for weapons, drugs and human trafficking. Tactical target eliminations, car chases and more; prevent minor crime with sharp precision and stop major crime with nothing but deadly force.



FEATURES:
  • An Epic Storyline
  • Lots of Sniper Action
  • Target Elimination Missions
  • Car Chases
  • Helicopters
  • Cinematic Sequences
  • Lots of Fan Request Implementation
  • Beautiful Summer and Winter Maps

Embark on a deadly mission and become the Perfect Sniper. Take down a massive underground criminal organization as a one-man army.
The Romanos' won't see you coming; the cavalry is here.
